live_matches.match_title: Borussia Monchengladbach vs Borussia Dortmund - MD 32 - 3 May 2026
live_matches.description: Borussia Mönchengladbach face Borussia Dortmund in a thrilling Bundesliga showdown, with Dortmund aiming to continue their strong run against a determined Gladbach side. The visitors will rely on their attacking firepower, while Gladbach look to rise to the occasion in front of their home fans. Catch all the action from Bundesliga 2025-26, LIVE on Sony LIV.
